posts.author: KuzoKevin
posts.title: While I agree with the intent, I can also see where this is going.  Government needs to control what kids think.

twitter.content:
We are banning social media access for under 16s.

These days kids must find their feet in a world where technology intrudes into every area of their life.

I just can’t let that go on anymore. So we’re giving children their childhoods back.
